headline: The LinkedIn pages went live overnight — no longer blank, so today's move is to post Batch 1 on top and finally open the PhantomBuster gate. Same Sunday desk session runs P6 + P7 through Fable before it dies tonight and sends Mercedes its 9-day-overdue reply; the IRS tap fires tomorrow 8 AM PT.
source: index.html · v15.2 Signal DATA block (Jul 19 AM sweep) + LinkedIn-pages-live delta

spotlight.title: Fable's final hours — P6 + P7 today, then it's gone
spotlight.detail: This is the last day (Sun Jul 19). Run the founder-ad outline (P6) and the insurance brief (P7) through Fable on the shared account — settle the 'Fable vs Opus with everything' question while you still can — then hand finished scripts to Chitraksh for Batch 3. The scripts were due next session anyway; after tonight the tool is locked out.

spotlight.title: Pages went live — now post Batch 1 to open the gate
spotlight.detail: Overnight both company Pages (Hanflux AI + Oraya AI) went from blank to real — Overview, Specialties and positioning all filled, so the '+430% search appearances but the page is blank' problem is cleared. What's left to fire the keystone: post the 6–7 Batch 1 reels on top, plus give Chitraksh two quick answers — a logo/banner for Oraya AI and a city for Location. Posting is the gate every PhantomBuster sequence waits behind.

spotlight.title: Mercedes reply — receipts + demo call, 9 days overdue
spotlight.detail: Their reply has sat since Jul 10. Build ours on timestamped screenshots of their own chatbot's multi-day delay → pitch voice AI + automation → book a live call where the agent demos itself. It's an email task — clear it in the same Sunday sitting as the Fable scripts before it slides into week three.

blockers.label: Fable expiry — end of today
blockers.detail: Access lapses tonight (Sun Jul 19). Both scripts — P6 founder-ad + P7 insurance — must go through Fable today; tomorrow the tool is locked.

blockers.label: IRS EIN — tap fires tomorrow 8 AM PT
blockers.detail: Re-fax window closed Jul 11 with zero signal — the EIN is called-for, not waited-on. Lines closed Sunday; first tap tomorrow 8 AM PT: 1-202-488-3100 (Chitraksh 8–11 rotation) + RedFax 510-497-1224 check.

blockers.label: Autoloop frozen (launchd)
blockers.detail: Day 23 frozen at cycle 10 — today's 09:00 IST retry already came and went, still stuck. 2-min fix: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Full Disk Access → enable the launchd runner. Flip it tonight and tomorrow's 09:00 run is the live test of cycle 11.

tasks.lead: Run P6 + P7 through Fable — TODAY, final hours
tasks.detail: Fable access lapses tonight. Founder-ad outline (P6) and insurance brief (P7) through Fable on the shared account; test it 'with everything' vs Opus to settle the tool question, then hand finished scripts to Chitraksh for Batch 3. After tonight: locked out.

The pages are no longer blank — About, Specialties and positioning went live this session. Now mutual-select from the 6–7 ready reels and post to your personal + the company pages. This is the keystone every PhantomBuster sequence waits on; Sunday-perfect, no business hours needed.

tasks.lead: Send the Mercedes reply + book the demo
tasks.detail: 9 days overdue (since Jul 10). Timestamped screenshots of their own chatbot's delay → pitch voice AI + automation → book the live call where the agent demos itself. Same desk session as the Fable scripts.

tasks.lead: IRS EIN — tap fires tomorrow 8 AM PT
tasks.detail: Lines closed Sunday. Monday 8 AM PT: call 1-202-488-3100 and check RedFax 510-497-1224. Re-fax window closed Jul 11 with no signal — this is call-for-it now, not wait-for-it. Tonight: set the alarm.

tasks.lead: Jharkhand: scan your network for a US investor
tasks.detail: Father's direct CM access (Hemant Soren) is the moat — precedent is Chinese interest at $50–100M per data-center; even $10–20M gets 'the best deal in the country.' Findings feed agenda item a6 at the next sync.

tasks.lead: 4:30 AM block discipline — hold the line.
tasks.detail: Fixed morning block is the rule, not the suggestion.

tasks.lead: Flip Full Disk Access — tonight, before tomorrow's 09:00 run
tasks.detail: Autoloop frozen 23 days at cycle 10; today's 09:00 IST retry already came and went still stuck. System Settings → Privacy & Security → Full Disk Access → enable the launchd runner — 2 minutes. Flip it tonight and tomorrow's scheduled run becomes the live test of cycle 11.

tasks.lead: Finish the LinkedIn pages + post Batch 1 (with Frankie)
tasks.detail: About + Specialties + positioning are filled on both Pages. Two answers left to fully finish: a logo/banner for Oraya AI and a real city for Location on both (LinkedIn requires City + Country). Then mutual-select the reels and post — the gate that unblocks every PhantomBuster sequence and the precondition for picking the first Phantom (agenda a5).

Wire the video-gen MCP into the growth engine, ingest Prompt P10 (Meeting-37 feedback), generate Batch 3 (12–13 reels: 6–7 insurance + Batch-2 fixes). The founder-ad + insurance cuts land the moment Frankie's P6/P7 scripts arrive from Fable.
Consultancy-reel voice standardized across all reels; TCPA reel subtitle/visual overlap fixed; DMS reel regenerated with approved voice + 2–3 new tagline proposals; no blank end screens.
Investor landing page with the downloadable brochure (Frankie's artifact is done). Father's political access is the pitch.

tasks.lead: IRS call rotation — tomorrow 8–11 AM PT
tasks.detail: Monday 8–11 AM PT (8:30–11:30 PM IST): ride out auto-disconnects until a live agent picks up. Closed today.

Curated from the v15.2 Signal board plus today's LinkedIn-pages-live delta, published to Vercel, dropped as a ready-to-send Gmail draft to both founders; the n8n SCHEDULE workflow covers the real send ~15 min after publish.

The AM brief's staged patch is shipped — the 09:00 sweep patched + PUSHED it to Vercel autonomously (commit 83c8c6e), carrying the stranded Jul 18 card and flipping the Fable chip to expires-today. Yesterday's 'awaiting Chitraksh's Mac push' item is cleared.

tasks.lead: LinkedIn Pages went live this session
tasks.detail: Both company Pages (Hanflux AI + Oraya AI) filled from blank — Overview, ~10 Specialties, positioning, year founded. Flagged the two remaining founder answers: a logo/banner for Oraya AI and a real city for Location. Posting stays gated on Batch 1 + explicit approval.

Gmail OAuth worked in the scheduled session: 0 new in 24h, 0 watch-list hits (EIN/IRS, dealership, opt-ins); newest mail still Jun 26. No Mercedes movement, no EIN signal, no new transcripts since May 18. The gates are founder-action-bound, not inbox-bound.

tasks.lead: Autoloop cycle 11 auto-fires the moment FDA flips
tasks.detail: The 09:00 IST launchd run retries every day — grant Full Disk Access and cycle 11 executes with no further action. Guardrails.md governs the run as always.

done.what: Inbox scan LIVE (Gmail OAuth worked in scheduled session): 0 new in 24h, 0 watch-list hits (EIN/IRS, A2P, Honda/dealership, cancellations, opt-ins) — 7th straight quiet sweep, account healthy, newest mail still Jun 26.

Dashboard v15.2 patched (am-sweep-2026-07-19 card, Fable chip → expires-today, w1 EIN note refreshed) and PUSHED to Vercel — commit 83c8c6e, carrying the stranded Jul 18 patch. Yesterday's push item cleared.

LinkedIn company Pages (Hanflux AI + Oraya AI) filled from blank this session — Overview, ~10 Specialties, positioning, year founded 2025. Logo/banner (Oraya AI) + a city for Location flagged to Chitraksh; posting stays gated on Batch 1.
Transcript check: 0 new since May 18 (workspace + email attachments) — board ingest skipped. 0 drafts needed — nothing in the 24h scan required a reply.
Memory updated: LinkedIn-pages note (IDs, relationship, what's filled vs missing) recorded; sandbox push pattern (inline W override + unique mktemp clone) re-verified.

waiting.what: TODAY: Fable access expires Sun Jul 19 — lock founder-ad (P6) + insurance (P7) scripts before it lapses
LinkedIn Batch 1 post (personal + company pages) — pages now filled; keystones all PhantomBuster sequences. Ready since Jul 12.
Finish LinkedIn setup: logo/banner for Oraya AI + a real city for Location on both pages
Mercedes re-pitch reply + live agent-demo booking — overdue 9 days (since Jul 10); weapon: delay screenshots
IRS EIN follow-up: call 1-202-488-3100 or check RedFax 510-497-1224 — fax window closed Jul 11, still zero signal
Full Disk Access toggle for launchd runner (System Settings → Privacy & Security) — 2-min fix, unblocks autoloop cycle 11+ (frozen 23d)
